location: Low-rate drop from the Godrick Knight mini-boss patrolling Gatefront Ruins in Limgrave (also drops from Redmane Knights at Fort Gael, Cuckoo Knights near Raya Lucaria Gate, Leyndell Knights, and mounted Mausoleum Knights in Deeproot Depths).
tactics: Gatefront Ruins sits directly north of Church of Elleh on the road to Stormveil Castle, guarded by roughly a dozen Godrick Soldiers led by the Godrick Knight mini-boss
The Godrick Knight specifically patrols the eastern road — don't mix him up with the horn-carrying regular soldier patrolling the west road
Resting at Gatefront grace for the first time triggers Melina's introduction cutscene, so expect that interruption on a first visit
Drop rate is very low; the later Leyndell Knights or Deeproot Depths Mausoleum Knights offer denser enemy counts if you'd rather farm there instead
lore: A broad-tipped spear built for more than thrusting — its wide blade lets a wielder sweep it sideways to cut down several foes at once.

builds.name: Quality crowd-control poke
builds.why: Even D-scaling Strength/Dexterity plus a sweeping horizontal attack (unusual for a spear) make it a solid quality pick against groups
